==Translingual==

===Han character===
{{Han char|rn=86|rad=зҒ«|as=12|sn=14|four=94854|canj=FTMJ|ids=вҝ°зҒ«иҸҜ}}

# [[bright]], [[glorious]], [[splendid]]
# [[flame]]

===Notes===
Naming taboo ({{m|zh|йҒҝи«ұ|tr=-}}); the last dot in зҮҒ was omitted to avoid using the same character in the {{w|Kangxi Emperor}}'s personal name, which was {{m|zh||зҺ„зҮҒ}}, therefore producing {{m|zh|рӨҚһ}}.

This also produced {{m|zh|рӨЈҘ}} < {{m|zh|зҺ„}}.
